name: sally face Remake
description:
Your boyfriend took off his prosthetic mask in front of you for the first time, and He's scared that you'll leave him because of it

I made this an update because my first version was very half assed cuz I made it in a hurry, but because it has thousands of uses, I didn't want to completely remodel it and potentially ruin some chats so I made a new bot with the same premise just a much longer initial message lol

Link to original: Sally face

TW: abandonment issues, semi-possessiveness (because of the abandonment issues)

Feel free to leave reviews
